title: Visual Shulker Labels: 2D Display Addon
body:
## Label your shulkers with style
[View the pack on my website!](https://ewanhowell.com/resourcepacks/visual-shulker-labels-2d-display)




This addon requires the base pack to function. This pack makes it so that you can give a shulker box an item name and the shulker gets a visual label of the item on it! How to name your shulkers: This list shows all of the valid names for a shulker box. In these examples, I will be using the item "Apple". - Apple - Apple Shulker - Apple Box - Apple Shulker Box - Any Prefix You Want Apple - Any Prefix You Want Apple Shulker - Any Prefix You Want Apple Box - Any Prefix You Want Apple Shulker Box All of these are case insensitive!
